items.title: REAM: Merging Improves Pruning of Experts in LLMs
items.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) large language models (LLMs) are among the top-performing architectures. The largest models, often with hundreds of billions of parameters, pose significant memory challenges

items.title: ClawsBench: Evaluating Capability and Safety of LLM Productivity Agents in Simulated Workspaces
